name: /postmortem --interactive reads the operator's caught-by answer from stdin and generates an eval spec under evals/specs/ per F-1
command: echo 'no-eval' | bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/postmortem.sh" 'unchecked eval call' --interactive 2>err.txt && ls evals/specs/postmortem-*-unchecked-eval-call.json >/dev/null 2>&1 && grep -q '"subject": "no-eval"' evals/specs/postmortem-*-unchecked-eval-call.json && echo generated 1>&2
